---
title: "Rocket Launches Package"
---

[Home](index.html) | [Tutorial](tutorial.html) | [Function Reference](reference.html) | [StreamLit App](https://rocket-py-package.streamlit.app/) | [Final Report](report.qmd)

# 🚀 Rocket Launches Package

Analyze rocket launch data over time using Python. This package helps you collect, clean, and explore rocket launch datasets from The Space Devs API.

## 🔧 What This Package Does

- Pulls historical and modern rocket launch data
- Cleans and formats datasets
- Adds launch era and country information
- Outputs a final dataset ready for analysis

## ⚡ Quick Example

```python
from Rocket_Launches import rocket_usage

df = rocket_usage()

df.head()
